{{Infobox group
| name = Eternity Incorporated
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity]] Incorporated is a powerful organization characterized by its pursuit of dangerous scientific research and the creation or enhancement of monsters. While it functions as a corporation, its internal structure resembles a cult where staff members must demonstrate intense devotion to advance. The entity's origins lie in a local religion centered on the myth that humanity would eventually produce an ideal monster capable of transforming the entire world. Using modern science, the organization aims to fulfill this prophecy. Their operations include maintaining a white spire marked with a rainbow spiral symbol and conducting expeditions into deep earth tunnels. Their ultimate objective involved a final project designed to exert global influence, though the organization eventually collapses, leaving various groups to compete for its recovered research and monstrous secrets.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Originally established as a local religion, [[Eternity]] Incorporated evolved into an organization that operates more like a cult than a traditional corporation. The entity's headquarters is defined by a central spire marked with a rainbow spiral symbol, and its workers are identifiable by white uniforms bearing that same emblem. While the group's stated objective is the improvement of monsters, they conduct dangerous research and perform investigations into various incidents occurring at their base. Deep within the basement of their headquarters, a new consciousness began to stir, yet the organization ultimately did not survive.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">9</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] is an evil corporation whose research is dangerous.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]]'s headquarters features a central spire with a rainbow spiral symbol.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] is an entity that conducts investigations into incidents at its headquarters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] operates more like a cult than a corporation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]]'s stated goal is improving monsters.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] was originally a local religion.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] workers wear white uniforms with a rainbow spiral symbol.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] is an organization with a headquarters containing a basement where a new consciousness stirred.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Eternity Incorporated]] did not survive.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle groups]]
